elements.original_description: A person with a worried expression, sitting at a desk with a calculator and scattered bills, surrounded by a faint red glow indicating stress. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a person with a visibly worried expression, sitting at a cluttered desk with a calculator and scattered bills and documents, bathed in a faint red glow to convey stress. Cinematic lighting with a soft focus on the subject's face and hands, realistic textures on the paper and calculator, shallow depth of field, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
